underlying_goal: Generate executable phase plans (PLAN.md files) for Phase 4 of a project roadmap using a custom GSD workflow with research, planning, and verification steps
friction_detail: Plan checker found a blocker requiring one revision iteration before passing verification.
brief_summary: User triggered a GSD plan-phase workflow for Phase 4, and Claude successfully researched, planned, verified (with one revision), and produced 3 verified plans across 3 waves.
